rules.reply:
Welcome to *Shailraj Travels Pune*! 🌍

How can we help you today?

Available Tours:
- Type *Ashtavinayak* for Ashtavinayak Yatra details.
- Type *Ujjain* for Ujjain Mahakal Yatra details.
- Type *Kedarnath* or *Char Dham* for Char Dham/Kedarnath Yatra details.
- Type *Jyotirlinga* for 5 Jyotirlinga Darshan details.
- Type *Pandharpur* for Pandharpur Wari details.
- Type *Shirdi* for Shirdi & Shani Shingnapur details.
- Type *Tirupati* for Tirupati Balaji tour details.

Reply with any keyword above to get instant details!

🙏 *Ujjain Mahakal Yatra Details* 🙏

Experience the spiritual bliss of Ujjain Mahakaleshwar & Omkareshwar!

*Duration:* 2 Nights / 3 Days (Every Friday - Sunday)
*Route:* Pune → Omkareshwar & Mamleshwar → Ujjain (Mahakaleshwar Bhasma Aarti) → Grishneshwar → Pune
*Inclusions:*
✅ Travel by AC Force Urbania / Innova
✅ Hotel Accommodation
✅ Pure Veg Meals (Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner)
✅ VIP Darshan passes assistance
✅ Tour Manager
✅ Travel Insurance

*Price:* Starting from ₹9,999 per person.

Reply with 'BOOK UJJAIN' to confirm your trip!

🚩 *Char Dham & Kedarnath Yatra* 🚩

Embark on the ultimate Himalayan pilgrimage!

*Duration:* 11 Nights / 12 Days (from Haridwar)
*Route:* Haridwar → Yamunotri → Gangotri → Kedarnath → Badrinath → Rishikesh → Haridwar
*Inclusions:*
✅ Hotel/Camp stay with hot water facility
✅ Pure Veg Breakfast & Dinner
✅ Kedarnath Trek/Helicopter assistance
✅ Priority medical screening & oxygen support
✅ Experienced tour guides

*Price:* Starting from ₹28,500 per person.

Reply with 'BOOK CHARDHAM' for slots & availability!

🐘 *Ashtavinayak Yatra Details* 🐘

Complete the sacred 8 Ganesha temples circuit comfortably!

*Duration:* 1 Night / 2 Days (Weekly Departures)
*Temples Covered:* Morgaon, Siddhatek, Pali, Mahad, Theur, Lenyadri, Ozar, Ranjangaon
*Inclusions:*
✅ Travel by AC Luxury Coach / Bus
✅ Comfortable Hotel Stay
✅ Pure Veg Hygienic Meals
✅ Tour Manager & Guide

*Price:* Starting from ₹3,999 per person.

Reply with 'BOOK ASHTAVINAYAK' to book your seat!

🔱 *5 Jyotirlinga Maharashtra Tour* 🔱

Visit all 5 sacred Jyotirlingas in Maharashtra in one tour!

*Duration:* 4 Nights / 5 Days
*Temples Covered:* Bhimashankar, Trimbakeshwar, Grishneshwar, Aundha Nagnath, Parli Vaijnath
*Inclusions:*
✅ Private AC Cab / Tempo Traveller
✅ Premium Hotel Accommodation
✅ Daily Breakfast & Dinner
✅ Transparent pricing (All toll/parking included)

*Price:* Starting from ₹12,500 per person.

Reply with 'BOOK JYOTIRLINGA' to enquire!

😇 *Shirdi Sai Baba & Shani Shingnapur Tour* 😇

Experience the divine presence of Sai Baba!

*Duration:* 1 Night / 2 Days
*Places Covered:* Shirdi (Samadhi Mandir, Dwarkamai) & Shani Shingnapur
*Inclusions:*
✅ AC Bus / Cab Travel from Pune
✅ Good Hotel Stay near Temple
✅ VIP Darshan pass assistance
✅ Pure Veg Meals

*Price:* Starting from ₹2,499 per person.

Reply with 'BOOK SHIRDI' for instant booking!

🙏 *Tirupati Balaji Darshan Tour* 🙏

Hassle-free VIP entry to Lord Venkateswara temple!

*Duration:* 2 Nights / 3 Days
*Inclusions:*
✅ Flight / Train tickets assistance
✅ VIP Special Entry Darshan Tickets
✅ AC Hotel stay in Tirupati
✅ Tonsuring arrangements & guide support

*Price:* Starting from ₹8,999 per person.

Reply with 'BOOK TIRUPATI' to plan your trip!

🚩 *Pandharpur & Tuljapur Tour* 🚩

Seek blessings of Vitthal-Rukmini and Tulja Bhavani!

*Duration:* 2 Nights / 3 Days
*Route:* Pune → Pandharpur → Solapur → Tuljapur → Alandi → Pune
*Inclusions:*
✅ AC Transportation
✅ Hotel Stay
✅ Pure Veg Meals
✅ Priority entry assistance

*Price:* Starting from ₹5,499 per person.

Reply with 'BOOK PANDHARPUR' to get in touch!
